creator: keramida@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
On Wed, Jun 27, 2001 at 07:45:35PM -0700, Hideaki Saito wrote:
 
 > >Environment:
 > FreeBSD deamon 4.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.3-RELEASE #0: Sat Apr 21
 > 10:54:49 GMT 2001 jkh@narf.osd.bsdi.com:/usr/src/sys/compile/GENERIC
 > i386
 > 
 > >Description:
 > There are error messages 
 > deamon getty[1302]: login_tty /dev/console: Operation not supported by device
 > Jun 28 20:59:25 deamon init: getty repeating too quickly on port /dev/console, sleeping 30 secs
 > 
 > >How-To-Repeat:
 > To start FreeBSD (?)
 
 This seems to be the kernel that came with the 4.3-RELEASE cdrom that
 you are running.
 
   + Have you ever booted FreeBSD on this system before?
 
   + Have you just installed FreeBSD?
 
     + If this is right after installation,
       what were the installation steps you took?
 
 Please give us some more details.
 This is too vague to understand what's wrong with your system.
 
 -giorgos
